company.name: Krevio
company.tagline: Done-for-you front office for local service businesses

core_build.description: Professional website + AI chatbot with voice + lead capture + GEO/SEO optimization
core_build.ownership: Client owns their domain, their customer data, and their business relationships

starter.name: Starter
starter.includes: Professional mobile-first website, AI chatbot with voice (multilingual), lead capture with instant email notifications, GEO/SEO optimization, Google Reviews on website, FAQ section, before/after gallery, 5 content updates per month, email support (48h response)

pro.name: Pro
pro.includes: Everything in Starter plus Google Business Profile setup and optimization, monthly performance report, 10 content updates per month, up to 3 additional service pages, priority support (same-day response), 90-day lead guarantee

guarantees.satisfaction: 30-day satisfaction guarantee — not happy after 30 days? Full refund of your first month.
guarantees.leads: 90-day lead guarantee (Pro plan only) — 10+ qualified inquiries through your website in the first 90 days, or month 4 is free.

services.cancel_policy: Month-to-month — cancel anytime. Your domain and customer data go with you.

features: Professional mobile-first website on your own domain
AI chatbot with voice — answers customer questions 24/7 in English, Spanish, and more
Lead capture with instant email notifications when someone contacts you
GEO/SEO — get found on Google AND AI search (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity)
Google Reviews displayed on your website
We build it, we manage it — you stay on the job

plumbing.highlights: AI chatbot, lead capture, GEO/SEO, multilingual

hvac.highlights: Maintenance plans, multilingual chatbot, lead capture

landscaping.highlights: Before/after gallery, seasonal services, multilingual chatbot

remodeling.highlights: Project portfolio, estimate requests, before/after gallery

realestate.highlights: REALTOR personal brand site, Fair Housing compliant, KW brokerage footer

differentiators: vs Thumbtack/Angi: You pay $500-$2,000/mo for shared leads sent to 5 other contractors. With Krevio, your leads go directly to you through your own website. No sharing.
vs Big agencies: They charge $2,000-$5,000/mo retainer with long contracts. We deliver the same results from $349/mo. Cancel anytime.
vs DIY tools (GHL, Wix, Squarespace): $97-$209/mo plus your time to learn and manage. Most small business owners sign up, get overwhelmed, and cancel within 90 days. We hand you a finished product.
vs 'My nephew does websites': Does it have an AI chatbot that answers calls at 2 AM? Does ChatGPT know your business exists? Who maintains it?
GEO optimization: We optimize for AI search (ChatGPT, Gemini), not just Google. Almost no local business is doing this yet.
AI chatbot with voice: The only feature competitors can't easily match today. Your customers can talk to your website.
geo_explanation: GEO stands for Generative Engine Optimization. When someone asks ChatGPT or Google AI for a plumber near them, GEO makes sure YOUR business shows up. It's like SEO but for AI search engines — and almost nobody is doing it yet for local businesses.
process: Step 1: Discovery — Tell us about your business. We show you a working demo tailored to your industry.
Step 2: Build — We build your professional website with AI chatbot and lead capture in 2-3 weeks.
Step 3: Launch + Grow — Your site goes live on your domain. We manage everything. You stay on the truck.

faq.a: Two plans: Starter at $349/mo and Pro at $597/mo. Setup fees start at $500. No per-lead fees, month-to-month, cancel anytime.
Your domain, your customer data, and your business relationships are yours. If you cancel, we export everything and help you transition. No lock-in.
Your monthly plan covers everything — website, AI chatbot, hosting, content updates, and support. No hidden fees, no usage charges.

faq.q: How does this compare to Thumbtack or Angi?
faq.a: On those platforms, you pay $500-$2,000/month for shared leads sent to 5 other contractors. With Krevio, you own your website, your chatbot captures leads exclusively for you, and there are no per-lead fees. Your leads go to you, not your competitors.

faq.q: Do you work with businesses outside DFW?
faq.a: We're based in DFW and specialize in local service businesses here, but we can work with businesses anywhere.
Most projects launch in 2-3 weeks from kickoff.

GEO is Generative Engine Optimization — it makes your business show up when people search using AI tools like ChatGPT, Google AI, or Perplexity. Think of it as SEO for the AI age. Almost no one is doing this for local businesses yet.
No contracts. Everything is month-to-month. Cancel anytime — your domain and data go with you. We also offer a 30-day satisfaction guarantee: not happy? Full refund of your first month.

faq.q: What's the difference between Starter and Pro?
faq.a: Starter gives you a great professional website with AI chatbot and lead capture. Pro adds Google Business Profile optimization, monthly performance reports, more content updates, and a 90-day lead guarantee. Starter gets you found online. Pro actively drives leads to you.
